summary: Comprehensive testing of German Inclusive Modern Dating Platform completed. Backend API fully functional (35/35 tests passed). Frontend core functionality working with session management issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: JWT token/session persistence issue - sessions expire quickly requiring frequent re-login

integration_issues.issue: Filter button and drawer may have selector/interaction issues
Chat page navigation and message input selectors need verification

passed_tests: Authentication system (register with consent validation, login with all seeded users)
Profile management (GET /me, PATCH /me with inclusive fields)
AI image moderation (photo upload with Gemini Vision - nsfw_score, has_face detection)
Discovery system (Werner appears in Alice's results, rounded distances)
Mutual matching (Alice + Werner likes create match)
Chat system (messages, media with AI moderation, access restrictions)
Albums (creation, photo addition, sharing restrictions with matches only)
Admin functions (all admin endpoints, proper access control)
Frontend discover page (Werner's profile displays with photo and details)
Frontend navigation (matches page, profile cards clickable)
Frontend user greeting (displays updated profile name)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix JWT token persistence/session management in frontend - sessions expire too quickly causing frequent re-login requirements. Investigate AuthContext token storage and refresh mechanisms.
